message.content:
@startuml
title HashedTimelockERC20 contract: normal flow – receiver withdraws with preimage before the timelock expires

participant "«Account»\nSender" as Sender
participant "«Account»\nReceiver" as Receiver
participant "«Smart Contract»\nHashedTimelockERC20" as HTLC
participant "«Smart Contract»\nERC20Contract" as ERC20
participant "Events" as Events

note right of HTLC
  State stored for each HTLC:
  address sender;
  address receiver;
  address tokenContract;
  uint amount;
  bytes32 hashlock;
  uint timelock; // UNIX ts
  bool withdrawn;
  bool refunded;
  bytes32 preimage;
end note

Sender -> ERC20: approve(htlc address, amount)
activate ERC20
ERC20 --> Sender
deactivate ERC20

Sender -> HTLC: newContract(\n  receiver,\n  hashlock,\n  timelock,\n  tokenContract,\n  amount\n)
activate HTLC
HTLC -> ERC20: transferFrom(sender, htlc address, amount)
activate ERC20
ERC20 --> HTLC
deactivate ERC20
HTLC -> Events: LogHTLCERC20New(contractId, locks, values, etc.)
HTLC --> Sender: contractId
deactivate HTLC

Sender -> Receiver: reveals contractId
activate Receiver
Receiver -> Receiver: knows/obtains secret preimage\n[sha256(secret preimage) == hashlock]
Receiver -> HTLC: withdraw(contractId, secret preimage)
activate HTLC
HTLC -> ERC20: transfer(receiver, amount)
activate ERC20
ERC20 --> HTLC
deactivate ERC20
HTLC -> Events: LogHTLCERC20Withdraw(contractId)
deactivate HTLC
deactivate Receiver

@enduml
